title.en: The Void Heaven Dao Ancestor said to Ye Tian.

content.en:
"Ye Tian, let's stop this matter!"

The Void Heaven Dao Ancestor said to Ye Tian.

"Yes, Master!"

Ye Tian nodded.

Although he also wanted to destroy the foundation of the Demon Sound Sect in the Great Universe, if he really angered the Dao Ancestor of the Demon Sound Sect, even his master, the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor, might not be able to protect him.

After all, the assassination of a Dao Ancestor, the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor can't stop it, unless he protects Ye Tian all the time, but is that possible?

Now that the Nanyou Dao Ancestor has personally ended, if he is still not interested and insists on killing these True Monarchs and Heavenly Monarchs of the Demon Yin Sect, then the consequences will not be something he can imagine!

Therefore, it is undoubtedly the best solution to stop receiving some benefits.

"Nanyou, pay a top ten Chaos Divine Power inheritance and the relative top-level innate origin thing, this matter is over, how about it?"

The Void Heaven Dao Ancestor looked at the Nanyou Dao Ancestor with a smile and said.

"What, the top ten Chaos Divine Powers on the Chaos Divine Power List, the power of those divine powers is enough to be comparable to some weaker Origin Divine Powers, and even if you imitate and transform them casually, you can become a powerful Origin Divine Powers. This kind of Chaos Divine Power is almost the basic Divine Power of the Origin Divine Power, and you actually made me pay such a price!"

Nanyou Dao Ancestor said angrily.

"Nanyou, what is the value of the Chaos Divine Power to us, and I remember that your Demon Yin Sect has a Chaos Divine Power Inheritance in the top ten on the list, it seems to be called the Space-Time Shock Technique, which is the Chaos Divine Power of the first vein of time and space, and the power is not bad, so let's do it!"

Void Heaven Dao Ancestor said with a smile.

"Time and Space Concussion Technique, hehe, even if you give it to this disciple, will he be able to learn it? Time Talent, Space Talent, and Concussion Talent, after the three major talents are fused, you can only cultivate the Time and Space Concussion Technique, and the space-time shock fruit that fuses the three major talents, our Demon Sound Sect is now out of use, and there is no way to give it to you." However, it is a top-level innate origin thing cultivated with the space-time shock technique-space-time shock stone, and there is one that can be given to your disciples. Say it first, once you've chosen, don't think about going back!"

Nanyou Dao Ancestral Road.

"I've chosen!"

Void Heaven Dao Ancestor said.

"That's good!" Nanyou Dao Ancestor waved his hand, and two rays of light fell in front of Ye Tian.

Among them is a book of inheritance that inherits the chaotic supernatural power of space-time shock, and another is a space-time shock stone.

"It's time for you to go!"

Nanyou Dao Ancestor had a gloomy face and drove away.

"Let's go!"

With a wave of his hand, the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor left here wrapped in Ye Tian and returned to the Void Heaven Palace.

Inside the Void Heaven Temple.

The Void Heaven Dao Ancestor stared at Ye Tian with unbelievable eyes and said, "Disciple, you are amazing. I thought you wouldn't be able to break the boundaries and break the demonic ban curse in this life. I'm even going to forcibly break the spell for you, even if your foundation is damaged, it's better than not being able to be promoted to the True Monarch. But I didn't expect that you really completed the unity of spirit and spirit. Now, it's only a matter of time before Dao Ancestor is for you. However, you still have to stabilize your foundation, and each realm must be promoted with the strongest foundation, otherwise you will become a Dao Ancestor in the future, and you will also be an ordinary Dao Ancestor, understand?"

"Disciple understands!"

Ye Tian nodded.

"Apprentice, the teacher also knows that you have a great opportunity, otherwise it is impossible to really complete the unity of essence and spirit, and the teacher does not want to delve into it, but you must save your life, and you must not expose the secret of the unity of spirit and spirit. Although Nanyou Dao Ancestor knew that your combat power was amazing, he didn't know that you had completed the unity of spirit and spirit. But it's not normal for you to have strong combat power, maybe Nanyou Daozu will also have suspicions. But in the chaos, there are too many unreasonable things, and it is not impossible to have half-step true spirits with powerful combat power like you, but those geniuses can only exert their strong strength by relying on special treasures. After today, the division will appropriately reveal a little bit of news, just say that you have the treasure I gave you, which can temporarily increase your combat power, so that no one will doubt it!"

"Thank you, Master!"

Ye Tian was grateful.

The Void Heaven Dao Ancestor said a lot, his combat strength is not normal, no matter how many other geniuses improve, they are far inferior to him in the half-step True Spirit Realm, if there is no reasonable explanation, if someone really probes his secret, maybe his secret will be easily exposed.

Therefore, the method of the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor can help him solve his troubles.

Suddenly.

The Void Heaven Dao Ancestor threw out a treasure, and this time the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor also carried the power into the Great Universe, and he could properly carry some treasures, just like the Southern Shadow Dao Ancestor sent the space-time shock technique inheritance into the Great Universe.

As long as they don't fight, the price paid by the Dao Ancestors is very small, almost negligible, so it has no impact.

"What is this?"

Ye Tian looked at the villain statue in front of him and asked curiously.

This statue was the size of a palm, and it was pitch black, but it emitted a strange light, and even Ye Tian's divine consciousness could not penetrate into it, as if it could isolate the invasion of divine consciousness and all powers.

"This is the statue of Barron, one of the strange things in chaos, the universe has the strange things of the universe, and the chaos also has the strange things of chaos. Some strange things are useless, while others have special effects. Chaos Strange Objects are also relatively rare, and most of them are useless, but the Barron Statue is a strange thing that can increase the battle, it can temporarily increase the combat power of ten or even twenty times for you, even for the True Ancestor, it can also increase the combat power of several times, and it is of little use to the Dao Ancestor. "Void Heaven Dao Ancestral Dao.

"Master, this Barron statue must be extremely precious!" Ye Tian asked.

"It's indeed very precious, it's worth about half a Dao weapon!" said the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor.

"What, half a Taoist !!"

Ye Tian was shocked.

This is such an astonishing wealth, countless times higher than the value of those star crystals in the original Ten Mile Sea, and only the value of the Star Dzi is higher than that of the Barron statue.

However, the dzi has not yet been conceived, and it will take a long time.

In short, the Barron statue is the most precious thing Ye Tian has ever seen, if the true ancestor sees it, he will also fight and snatch it, after all, the true ancestor got the Barron statue, and his strength immediately skyrocketed several times!

Moreover, I'm afraid it will also be of some use to such an anti-naïve true ancestor.

Of course, those anti-heaven true ancestors may also have one or several strange objects similar to the Barron statue, and they may not be able to look down on the Barron statue.

"Master, is this really for me?"

Ye Tian asked.

"Of course you give it to you, if you don't give it to you, this lie is easy to debunk. Moreover, if you can complete the unity of spirit and spirit, I naturally have to give some rewards, otherwise wouldn't it seem too hard for the teacher! The Barron statue is very precious to you, but for the teacher, it is just a small item, don't be embarrassed!"

Void Heaven Dao Ancestor said with a smile.

"Then the disciple accepted it!"

Ye Tian said happily.
